title: Pre-Award — Proposal and Budget Examples
content:
Successful proposal and budget examples from Morgan State University's Office of Research Administration, organized into NSF and NIH sections. For ORA questions contact ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044 (fax 443-885-8280).

National Science Foundation (NSF) submissions:
- NSF EIR Proposal by Tom Hulse (2018)
- NSF Sample Awarded Proposal — Sociology (2014)
- NSF Sample Awarded Proposal — Geoscience
- NSF Sample Awarded Proposal — Mathematics (2009)

National Institutes of Health (NIH) submissions:
- NIH Sample Proposal — Chemistry (1-R01-AI121500-01A1)
- NIH Sample Proposal — Chemistry (2-R01-AI042783-16A1, Muir application)

The page also links to NIH's official Sample Applications, Attachments, and Other Documents page at https://grants.nih.gov/grants/how-to-apply-application-guide/resources/sample-applications.htm for additional reference materials.
